subject: A glowing spherical crystal orb displayed on a stand or base, emanating a soft purple-blue light
description: A luminous, spherical crystal ball sits on a small decorative base or stand. The orb glows with soft purple and blue light from within, giving it an ethereal and mystical quality. The interior appears to contain a swirling or cloudy luminescence. The background is a cool light blue-white, keeping the focus entirely on the glowing object. The overall mood is quiet and mysterious.
foreground: Glowing spherical crystal orb on a decorative stand
